## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? Keep it short — focus on the "why". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, dependencies, config
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (TDD: tests written before implementation)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`docker compose exec api bundle exec rspec` / `docker compose exec web pnpm test`)
- [ ] Linters pass locally (`rubocop` / `pnpm lint` / `pnpm type-check`)
- [ ] No new Brakeman or bundler-audit warnings (backend changes)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed (README, AGENTS.md, inline comments)
- [ ] Mobile-first responsive design verified at 375px width (frontend changes)

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to: tradeoffs, follow-ups, related issues. -->
